allow: PowerShell($r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/JMMaupin/KEF-LSX-II-Controller/contents/dist/KEF%20LSX%20Controller.exe" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($r2\){ \($r2.Content | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object name, size, sha, download_url\) } else { "KEF-LSX-II-Controller introuvable" })
PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:Path;C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI"; gh auth status 2>&1)
Bash(git commit -m 'Stop tracking built binaries; publish via GitHub Releases *)

Bash(py -3.14 -m PyInstaller --noconfirm --onefile --noconsole --name "KEF LSX Controller" --icon "Kef-LSX-HP.ico" --add-data "Kef-LSX-HP.ico;." --collect-data customtkinter --hidden-import pystray._win32 main.py)
Bash(gh release create v0.2.0 'dist\\KEF LSX Controller.exe' --title v0.2.0 --notes '- Config stockée dans %APPDATA%\\KefLSXController \(fonctionne depuis C:\\Program Files\) *)
